name: copilot-subagent
description: Run GitHub Copilot CLI as a Codex plugin subagent for delegation and review workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work or reviews to GitHub Copilot CLI.
interface.longDescription: Use GitHub Copilot CLI as a Codex companion for delegated coding tasks, code review, and adversarial review flows.
defaultPrompt: Use Copilot Subagent to delegate the current coding task.
Use Copilot Subagent to review my current changes.
Use Copilot Subagent to adversarially review this diff.
